title: Define List Box Properties (Character Mode)
text: Define List Box Properties (Character Mode) Define the properties for this list box when it appears in character mode. For information about list box widgets, see ulistbox (ListBox ) . Fields Sort Alphabetically Frame Value and Representation Related Links Widgets and Character Mode If you create components that are intended for use in a character mode environment, be economical with the amount of text you display in each label and widget.
